Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Do you ever feel encouraged reading about the influential figures of the past?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Even leaders who forged great nations faced the challenges of interpersonal relationships...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Yes... It becomes easier to bear when you consider it's something everyone has to go through.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Or is it presumptuous of me to relate to such illustrious figures?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Heh, does it tarnish your image of such illustrious figures to imagine them on the same level as us?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Everyone interprets art in their own way. That's part of what makes it so interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, it's natural to consider things, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, were you expressing concern for me? Thank you, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Sorry, I didn't mean to distract from our reading.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Oh, look at the time. I think that's enough for today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 4 1 5}That was a pleasant time together, hearing nothing but the sound of each other's pages.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By learning about the exploits[n]of renowned individuals, my[n]{f 4 30 0 1 1 0} have improved...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'd like to hear your thoughts on our reading again sometime. But for now, good night.[n]{f 1 1}
